pages.raw_text:
The premature explosion of dyna-
mite resulted in the instant death of
Peter Grinland and the serious in
juring of C. A. Dodson, the latter
of whom was brought to the Sacred
Heart hospital last night.


The two men were employed on the
900-foot ditch which Honeyfinger
the real estate dealer of this city
is building at his ranch near Ritz
vile to drain a large slough which
is to be cultivated.


Quite large force of men have
been employed for some time past
and among them were the victims of
yesterdays accident.


Dodson places the blame on no one.
but says the stick of dynamite must
have been an old one and therefore a
defective one. Between catches of
the breath caused by his injuries he
told the following story of the acct
dent this morning:


"Grinland and l had been employed
there some time on the rock work.
